message:
chore(beads): close br-r37-c1-blu7u (weight=int parity)

Fixed in commit 9bd55f2.  Updated _should_delegate_* gates to
route any non-string weight (including None, int, float, bytes,
tuple) to nx.  The Rust bindings have ``weight: str`` signatures
that type-reject anything else; nx accepts any hashable and
silently falls back to default-1 unweighted distances.
eccentricity has its own fast-path and was patched directly.

Side benefit: incidentally fixes a pre-existing latent bug where
``weight=None`` (explicit) was rejected by the Rust path.

Sweep: 7076 passed, 0 failed (+32 new regression tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
